name: Monument Hill Farmers' Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

notes: On-file record had no website/facebook. The market is operated by 'Colorado Springs Farmer's Markets' (run via Cordera Market); its official operator site (Wix-based, JS-heavy, only header/contact/footer text extractable via fetch) has a dedicated Monument page at springsfarmersmarkets.com/monument, confirmed as the market's official website by the Town of Monument's own event calendar page (which links to it and gives location/hours/season). Phone (719-351-0012) and email (corderamarket@yahoo.com) come from the operator site's general contact section, not a Monument-specific line, so may route to the operator rather than this market directly. Address corrected from file's '146 Jefferson Street' to '66 Jefferson Street, Monument, CO 80132' (Big Red / Lewis Palmer D38 Administration Building), per the Town of Monument calendar listing; multiple other sources (colorado.com, search aggregators) also cite 66 Jefferson St. A dedicated Facebook page (facebook.com/monumenthillfarmersmarket) exists and is referenced by aggregators as the market's page, but Facebook blocked automated content fetch so its contents (hours/products/etc.) could not be independently verified beyond the page's existence/URL. Third-party sources (colorado.com, nfmd.org, springsfarmersmarkets homepage) mention 'organic' produce and roughly 45 vendors/Saturday, but none clearly and authoritatively state Products, SNAP/EBT acceptance, ADA accessibility, or Certified Organic status on an official source, so those fields were omitted. A slightly older/alternate operator URL format (springsfarmersmarkets.com/#!monument/cc1x) also appears in some listings but redirects to the same site.
